payload.description:
Add a first-class CLI and MCP path for invalidating a single feedback item by deterministic identifier resolution instead of relying on brittle manual UI actions.

Definition of done:
- A CLI command can invalidate exactly one feedback item at a time.
- The command accepts a raw feedback item ID or an item identifier that resolves to the underlying Item.
- Ambiguous item-to-feedback matches fail with a clear disambiguation error instead of mutating multiple records.
- An MCP tool exposes the same capability for agent workflows.
- The implementation is covered by tests and documented through command help/output.
payload.title: Add targeted feedback invalidation tooling
